detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Shika._transfer(address,address,uint256) (Shika.sol#643-767):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (Shika.sol#707)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (Shika.sol#781-793)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (Shika.sol#713)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (Shika.sol#801)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (Shika.sol#765)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (Shika.sol#927)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (Shika.sol#907)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (Shika.sol#909)
	Shika._rOwned (Shika.sol#319) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Shika._takeTeam(uint256) (Shika.sol#921-929)
	- Shika._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (Shika.sol#881-917)
	- Shika.balanceOf(address) (Shika.sol#469-473)
	- Shika.constructor() (Shika.sol#403-433)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (Shika.sol#765)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (Shika.sol#935)
	Shika._rTotal (Shika.sol#331) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Shika._getCurrentSupply() (Shika.sol#1077-1087)
	- Shika._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (Shika.sol#933-939)
	- Shika.constructor() (Shika.sol#403-433)
	- Shika.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (Shika.sol#565-587)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [Shika._transfer(address,address,uint256)](Shika.sol#L643-L767):
	External calls:
	- [swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance)](Shika.sol#L707)
		- [uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp)](Shika.sol#L781-L793)
	External calls sending eth:

		- [_marketingAddress.transfer(amount)](Shika.sol#L801)
	State variables written after the call(s):

		- [_rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam)](Shika.sol#L927)
		- [_rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount)](Shika.sol#L907)
		- [_rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount)](Shika.sol#L909)
	[Shika._rOwned](Shika.sol#L319) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [Shika._takeTeam(uint256)](Shika.sol#L921-L929)
	- [Shika._transferStandard(address,address,uint256)](Shika.sol#L881-L917)
	- [Shika.balanceOf(address)](Shika.sol#L469-L473)
	- [Shika.constructor()](Shika.sol#L403-L433)
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](Shika.sol#L765)
		- [_rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee)](Shika.sol#L935)
	[Shika._rTotal](Shika.sol#L331) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [Shika._getCurrentSupply()](Shika.sol#L1077-L1087)
	- [Shika._reflectFee(uint256,uint256)](Shika.sol#L933-L939)
	- [Shika.constructor()](Shika.sol#L403-L433)
	- [Shika.tokenFromReflection(uint256)](Shika.sol#L565-L587)
